kicker: ET LEVEL I // APPLICATIONS, ADVANTAGES, LIMITS

beats.narration: Everything eddy current ever reports arrives as one quantity — a change in coil impedance. So what is that single reading actually for?

payload.title: ONE IMPEDANCE CHANGE
payload.sub: Three jobs ride on a single reading.

beats.narration: That one reading supports three families of work. The coil cannot tell them apart — you separate them with frequency, phase, and reference standards.
Conductivity in percent IACS verifies heat treatment and exposes fire damage. Lift-off gauges paint thickness. Bolt-hole probes catch fatigue cracks too small to see.

payload.heading: What each family delivers
payload.note: PROPERTIES · FLAWS · GEOMETRY — ALL FROM ONE COIL

beats.narration: The advantages explain the method's reach: no couplant, no required contact, inspection straight through paint, instant results, and easy automation.
But two gates close the method. No conduction, no test. The skin effect confines it to the surface — deeper flaws belong to ultrasonic or radiography.

payload.sub: Many variables move one dot — reference standards are not optional.
